items.html: *Know that since these ten Sefirot that are called the world of Akudim, are lights and branches that emerged from the Peh of AK, and it is known that within the Peh itself will be the ten Sefirot in her, and in her tenth Sefira, called the Malchut in her, there are ten roots of these ten Sefirot that came out, which are called the world of Akudim. They are also called ten Sefirot from Keter to Malchut, and they are roots to these ten Sefirot of Akudim that came out, for so it is in all the worlds.
